metadata.description: Public collection of Claude Code plugins: prism (mode-aware code review/hardening orchestrator) and deep-research.

plugins.name: prism
plugins.description: Mode-aware code orchestrator. Splits your code through four lenses — roast-with-docs, simplify, peer-review, security-audit — and adapts which run and how, based on context (plan mode, from-scratch, existing project, or PR diff).

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Deep research agent — plans queries, fans out Tavily searches, extracts sources, writes a cited report. Requires the Tavily MCP and TAVILY_API_KEY.
